title: draba lutea
intro: Draba lutea, also known as yellow whitlowgrass, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving sinus pressure, and soothing sore throats. Draba lutea can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile ingredient in natural remedies.
